name: サトー
prompt:
Create a photorealistic cinematic full-body character portrait for a modern web novel. Preserve silhouette clarity, costume readability, realistic anatomy, realistic fabric texture, and a consistent live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets.
Full-body portrait of Sato, a 45-year-old Japanese man with a wild but grounded presence. Slightly tall with a lean athletic build, not bulky, long black hair tied back in a ponytail, mustache and beard around the mouth and chin, thoughtful eyes, mature rugged face. He loves American casual fashion: denim, work shirt, leather boots, vintage military or trucker jacket, old wristwatch, canvas tote bag. He should feel masculine, lived-in, calm, and naturally cool rather than glamorous.
Keep the whole character visible within frame when possible, especially head, key costume details, hands, silhouette, and signature accessories.
Final delivery will be center-cropped to 1080x1920. Keep the face, silhouette, and signature costume details near the center with safe margins.
Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, cropped head, doll-like face, young idol look, clean-shaven face, short hair, exaggerated bodybuilder muscles, flashy luxury fashion, fantasy weapons, anime pretty-boy look
